message:
fix(preflight): move eval false-positive tests into proptest strategy block

The eval_call_no_false_positive_on_underscore_identifiers and
eval_call_no_false_positive_on_dollar_identifiers tests were plain
#[test] functions sitting outside the proptest! macro block. This caused
them to be treated as regular unit tests rather than property tests,
which was inconsistent with the surrounding test organization where all
tests in the module use proptest strategies.

Move both tests into the proptest! block by adding a `_dummy in Just(())`
parameter. This:
- Makes them consistent with the surrounding test structure
- Ensures they participate in proptest's shrinking/replay infrastructure
- Keeps them co-located with the other eval/dynamic-import false-positive
  property tests they logically belong with

The test logic itself is unchanged — only the test harness wrapper changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
